touches.ai_summary: Aisha Nelson from PeakSync submitted an inbound demo request expressing interest in improving pipeline visibility for their sales team. Initial inquiry mentioned current challenges with scattered data across tools.
Follow-up email sent to Aisha confirming receipt of demo request and proposing times for qualification call. Aisha responded same day confirming availability for Thursday 2pm.

Calendar confirmation and pre-call questionnaire sent to Aisha. She responded with completed questionnaire indicating team size of ~20-25 sales reps, current use of Fireflies, and pain points around lack of deal intelligence and coaching insights.

questions_asked.question: What's your current call recording setup?
questions_asked.answer: Using Fireflies currently but only for basic transcription

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute qualification call with Aisha Nelson. Discussed PeakSync's growth from 600 to 871 employees over past year and corresponding sales team expansion. Aisha explained their Director of Sales role focuses on enablement and process. Confirmed budget authority sits with RevOps/Sales leadership. Strong fit identified around pipeline visibility use case.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Fireflies beyond transcription?
questions_asked.answer: We provide AI-driven deal intelligence, risk scoring, and automated coaching insights rather than just transcripts

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: I'd want to loop in our RevOps Analyst Lily and a few account managers who'd be primary users

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader team
Send case study for EdTech companies

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute follow-up call with Aisha to coordinate next steps. Discussed bringing in Noah Turner (Account Manager) and Lily Osei (RevOps Analyst) for discovery. Aisha mentioned they're in Q4 planning cycle which creates good timing for new tool evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What's typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for initial setup, with ongoing optimization support

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with Noah and Lily

touches.ai_summary: Email recap sent to Aisha with discovery call agenda and calendar invite including Noah Turner and Lily Osei. Aisha confirmed all attendees and requested we include specific focus on CRM integration capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with HubSpot?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native bi-directional sync with HubSpot

next_steps: Discovery call Tuesday 10am with extended team

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute discovery call with Aisha and Noah Turner. Noah shared account manager perspective on needing better visibility into deal health and customer sentiment trends. Discussed current workflow gaps where insights from calls aren't systematically captured in CRM.

questions_asked.question: Can reps see their own call analytics or is this manager-only?
questions_asked.answer: Reps have full access to their own analytics and coaching recommendations, managers see team-wide views

questions_asked.question: How are you currently measuring deal health?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual - managers review call recordings selectively, very time-intensive

touches.ai_summary: 30-minute discovery call with Aisha, Noah, and Lily Osei (RevOps Analyst). Deep dive into technical requirements and data workflow. Lily asked detailed questions about data retention, privacy controls, and reporting API. Discussed their HubSpot setup and current Fireflies integration pain points. Team aligned on core use case: automated deal intelligence to improve forecast accuracy.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and can we control what gets recorded?
questions_asked.answer: Customizable retention from 1-7 years, full controls over recording triggers and PII redaction

questions_asked.question: How does pricing work - per user or per seat?
questions_asked.answer: Per seat pricing for active users, with analytics available to broader manager audience

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Around 65-70%, lots of late-stage slippage we don't see coming

objections: Need to understand migration path from Fireflies - can't have disruption to current workflows
next_steps: Include implementation team in next call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with Fireflies migration plan, ROI calculator, and demo scheduling options. Aisha responded requesting to add Wyatt Taylor and Penelope Watson from implementation team to demo, and mentioned they'd want to see this in action before moving forward.
next_steps: Demo scheduled for next Wednesday with implementation team included

touches.ai_summary: 27-minute discovery call with implementation leads Wyatt Taylor and Penelope Watson. Focused on technical integration requirements, SSO setup, user onboarding process, and change management. Wyatt asked about API rate limits and webhook reliability. Discussed their tech stack and integration points.

questions_asked.question: What level of IT involvement is needed for setup?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal - mostly configuration vs custom development, IT needed primarily for SSO setup

questions_asked.question: How do you handle calendar permissions across the org?
questions_asked.answer: User-level OAuth consent, no org-wide admin consent required

questions_asked.question: What's your rollout preference - full team or phased?
questions_asked.answer: Probably phased, start with 5-10 reps then expand

touches.ai_summary: 32-minute demo with Aisha, Noah, Lily, Wyatt, and Penelope. Walked through live deal intelligence dashboard, showed AI-generated risk signals and coaching insights. Team engaged positively with pipeline visibility features. Lily particularly interested in reporting API for custom dashboards. Wyatt confirmed integration approach looks feasible.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the risk scoring model for our specific deal patterns?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, model learns from your historical data and can be tuned to your win/loss patterns

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, custom playbook development, quarterly business reviews, and ongoing optimization

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for decision?
questions_asked.answer: Need to present to leadership by end of month, hoping to launch Q1

objections: Want to see comparison with keeping Fireflies vs switching - need clearer ROI justification

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled executive meeting with Aisha was rescheduled by prospect team. Aisha mentioned they needed to align internally before bringing in senior leadership. No new date set immediately.
next_steps: Wait for prospect to propose new executive meeting time

touches.ai_summary: 36-minute executive meeting with Aisha and Chris Nguyen (Sales Manager). Presented business case focused on forecast accuracy improvement and rep productivity gains. Chris asked probing questions about adoption metrics from other EdTech customers and change management approach. Discussed 23-seat initial deployment covering their core sales team.

questions_asked.question: What adoption rates do you see with customers in first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 85%+ active usage when paired with our consulting package and manager engagement

questions_asked.question: How do we ensure reps actually use this vs it becoming shelfware?
questions_asked.answer: Built into daily workflow via CRM integration, plus coaching nudges make it valuable for reps themselves

questions_asked.question: Are there other stakeholders we should include in this evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Chris and I can champion this, but final budget approval comes from VP Sales who's pretty hands-off on tools

next_steps: Send formal proposal for 23 seats with consulting

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled proposal review meeting was rescheduled by prospect. Aisha mentioned Chris needed to review proposal more thoroughly before meeting. Proposed new time for following week.
next_steps: Proposal review rescheduled to next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute proposal review call with Aisha. Walked through $19,100 ACV proposal for 23 seats including automations plus consulting package. Aisha confirmed numbers look reasonable but mentioned she needs to socialize with Chris and get VP Sales awareness before proceeding.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the consulting component?
questions_asked.answer: We can adjust scope, but recommend keeping it for first year to ensure successful rollout

next_steps: Aisha to review with Chris and VP Sales

touches.ai_summary: 48-minute deep-dive proposal discussion with Aisha, Chris, and Lily. Reviewed pricing structure, contract terms, and implementation timeline in detail. Chris raised questions about comparison with simply upgrading their Fireflies plan. Team discussed ROI calculations and whether 23 seats is right starting point vs smaller pilot. Lily asked about payment terms and invoicing schedule.

questions_asked.question: What would a smaller pilot look like - maybe 10-12 seats to start?
questions_asked.answer: We can do that but per-seat cost increases, and you lose some team-wide intelligence benefits

questions_asked.question: Can you break out exactly what we get beyond Fireflies feature-by-feature?
questions_asked.answer: Provided detailed comparison showing deal intelligence, risk scoring, coaching automation as key differentiators

questions_asked.question: What's blocking moving forward at 23 seats?
questions_asked.answer: Just want to make sure we're making right investment - Fireflies is working okay, need to justify the switch

objections: Fireflies cost is much lower - need stronger justification for 3x price increase
Concerned about change management burden on team mid-quarter
next_steps: Provide revised ROI analysis vs Fireflies
Loop in VP Sales for final approval

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled negotiation call was rescheduled by prospect team. Aisha indicated they're still working through internal budget discussions and VP Sales has questions. No specific concerns shared yet.
next_steps: Wait for prospect to confirm new time after internal alignment

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute negotiation discussion with Aisha and Chris. They've decided to move forward but requesting discount given it's their first year and they're switching from existing tool. Asked about 15-20% reduction to make business case work internally. Also discussed contract flexibility if adoption doesn't meet targets.

questions_asked.question: Can we get a discount for annual prepay?
questions_asked.answer: Already reflected in proposal - monthly would be 20% higher

questions_asked.question: What happens if we want to reduce seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Annual commitment is fixed, but can adjust at renewal or add seats anytime

objections: Price needs to come down 15-20% to get VP Sales approval
Want performance guarantee or exit clause in case adoption fails
next_steps: Review discount request with sales leadership

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Aisha with revised proposal including 10% discount bringing ACV to $19,100 and added success metrics framework but no exit clause. Positioned as best-and-final given their seat count and first-year status. Aisha acknowledged receipt and said she'd discuss with team.
next_steps: Follow up in 2 days if no response

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled final negotiation call was rescheduled by prospect. Aisha mentioned VP Sales had scheduling conflict but they're close to decision. Indicated they're generally aligned on moving forward with revised terms.
next_steps: Rescheduled to Friday for final alignment
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming Friday meeting and providing contract draft for advance review. Aisha confirmed she, Chris, and Lily will attend to finalize terms. Requested minor contract language adjustments around data privacy which were incorporated.

questions_asked.question: Can we adjust data processing terms to reference our DPA template?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, sending updated contract with your DPA language included

next_steps: Contract ready for signature pending verbal approval
